description_long: This ottoman features a generously padded, rectangular cushion upholstered in a light, neutral fabric with visible button tufting on the top surface, creating a classic and elegant look. The cushion sits atop a sturdy, boxy base that is also upholstered in the same fabric, providing a seamless and cohesive appearance. The ottoman is supported by four dark, turned wooden legs, which add a touch of traditional style and elevate the piece off the ground. The top surface is flat and spacious, making it suitable for sitting or placing items. The button tufting creates subtle indentations and a quilted effect, enhancing both comfort and visual interest. The overall design is refined and versatile, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A rectangular, light-colored ottoman with button-tufted upholstery and dark turned wooden legs, offering a classic and elegant appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the ottoman, highlighting the button-tufted cushion and all four turned wooden legs.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the ottoman's depth, the thickness of the cushion, and the profile of the turned legs.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the button-tufted cushion and the back two legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the depth and cushion thickness, with the legs visible from a different angle.
